title: workbook.xlsx.readFile(file) always no any response
author: ecool2011

comments.author: gs96222
comments.body: I am also facing the same issue, even if I am passing the buffer using exceljs 4.3.0

comments.author: tomasniculae
comments.body:
in my case, the reason it didn't work it was the file I was trying to modify. It was generated from one of the templates that microsoft provides.

 I just created another file on a windows machine (cause I thought the reason was that the file was created on a mac), copied the contents from the original and it worked.
